title: 7 Best Mailchimp Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Mailchimp alternative for your needs. Compare free and paid email marketing platforms with advanced features.
intro: While Mailchimp is a popular choice for beginners, many users outgrow its limitations or seek better customer support and pricing. Whether you need more advanced automation, industry-specific features, or a platform with higher customer satisfaction ratings, there are several excellent alternatives worth considering.
why_switch: Better customer support and higher satisfaction ratings on review platforms
More advanced automation and segmentation capabilities for growing businesses
Industry-specific features tailored to creators, e-commerce, or newsletter publishers

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers a nearly identical feature set to Mailchimp but starts at just $9/month with a free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers. It consistently earns higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.6 on G2, 4.5 on Trustpilot) and includes pop-ups and surveys alongside standard email marketing tools.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators with built-in monetization, an ad network, and referral program features that Mailchimp lacks. Its free tier supports up to 2,500 subscribers and boasts excellent satisfaction ratings (4.7 on G2, 4.4 on Trustpilot).

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is specifically designed for creators and solopreneurs with subscriber tagging, visual automations, and built-in commerce features. Its free tier includes up to 1,000 subscribers, making it more generous than Mailchimp's 500-subscriber limit.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing, CRM, and advanced automation in one platform starting at $15/month. It's ideal for businesses that have outgrown Mailchimp's basic automation and need lead scoring, site tracking, and sophisticated customer journeys.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptionally generous free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat channels. It's the best choice if you need multi-channel marketing beyond email within a single platform.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo is purpose-built for e-commerce with deep integrations, predictive analytics, and SMS marketing tailored to online sellers. If you run an online store, Klaviyo's advanced segmentation and flow automation outperform Mailchimp's generic e-commerce features.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse includes built-in webinar hosting, online course functionality, and conversion funnels alongside email marketing—features Mailchimp doesn't offer natively. It's ideal if you're building an educational or digital product business.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with support for up to 100,000 subscribers, plus additional channels like SMS and WhatsApp. If you prefer a traditional email-only platform, MailerLite and ConvertKit both offer free tiers supporting 1,000 subscribers with comparable features to Mailchimp's free plan.

faq.q: What is the best Mailchimp alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the best overall alternative for small businesses, offering nearly identical features at a lower starting price ($9/month vs. $13/month) and significantly better customer satisfaction ratings. For businesses requiring CRM and advanced automation, ActiveCampaign provides superior tools at only $15/month.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes—MailerLite starts at $9/month compared to Mailchimp's $13/month. Brevo also offers a robust free tier with unlimited subscribers, making it effectively free for businesses under 100,000 contacts. GetResponse ($19/month) includes webinar hosting, making it cheaper per feature than Mailchimp.
